summary: Comprehensive testing of Water Watch UK enhanced home water quality features completed successfully. All major functionality working correctly.

minor_bugs.issue: Invalid postcode returns 200 status instead of 400
minor_bugs.impact: Minor validation issue - doesn't affect core functionality

passed_tests: Home Water Supply page loads at /home-water
Yorkshire Water company detection for LS postcodes
Water Quality tab displays all parameters (chlorine, hardness, lead, fluoride)
Report Issue button and dialog functionality
API endpoint /api/home-water/quality returns complete water quality data
API endpoint /api/home-water/area-report returns area report with coordinates
All water quality parameters show correct values and status
UI navigation and tab switching works correctly
Proper error handling and loading states
